verdict: Homepage batch: 5 principles with issues; top concerns: high be-inclusive: axe found 1 violation groups; medium be-sustainable: Heavy transfer on initial load (10.1 MB); medium be-private-and-secure: Large third-party/network surface.

Memory is a single heap snapshot, not a repeated-interaction leak proof.
Dark-mode/reduced-motion are inferred from probes unless separately captured.
